query: I am lactose intolerant but really want a creamy alfredo. Make it work.
expected_behavior: Calls ingredient_substitution to swap dairy (cashew cream / coconut milk / lactose-free cream) and still delivers an alfredo-style dish.
final_answer:
Creamy lactose-free Alfredo recipe (serves 6)

Source: https://www.stldairycouncil.org/2025/07/Lactose-Free-Alfredo-Sauce-Recipe

Ingredients
- 2 tablespoons olive oil
- 2 tablespoons butter
- 1 tablespoon chopped garlic
- 4 tablespoons flour
- 1 cup lactose-free whole milk
- 1 cup chicken broth
- 1 cup Parmesan cheese (Parmigiano Reggiano)
- 1/2 teaspoon salt
- 1/4 teaspoon black pepper
- 12 oz fettuccine pasta, cooked according to package directions

Steps
1. Place the olive oil and butter in a large saucepan over medium-low heat and melt the butter.
2. Add the garlic and simmer for about 1 minute.
3. Stir in the flour until fully incorporated and cook the roux for 1 minute.
4. Whisk in the lactose-free whole milk and chicken broth, then bring to a simmer.
5. When the sauce starts to thicken, stir in the Parmesan, salt, and pepper.
6. Toss with cooked fettuccine and serve immediately.

Notes
- This keeps the classic creamy Alfredo feel while avoiding lactose.
- If you want it even richer, use a little extra Parmesan or a splash more lactose-free milk to adjust the texture.
